pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the pantilt100 system and ROS 2 Stack: what it is, what hardware it targets, the three-package architecture, and key capabilities. Links to child pages for deeper coverage.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for setting up the workspace, installing dependencies, building the packages, and launching the system for the first time — both with real hardware and in mock mode.

pages.title: Repository Structure
pages.purpose: Explains the three-package layout (pt100_description, pt100_control, pt100_bringup), their responsibilities, and how they depend on each other and on external packages like sts_hardware_interface and depthai_ros_driver.

pages.title: Robot Description (pt100_description)
pages.purpose: Overview of the pt100_description package: URDF/Xacro model architecture, mesh assets, and camera description. Links to child pages for the kinematic model and mesh details.

pages.title: URDF / Xacro Model Architecture
pages.purpose: Detailed explanation of the four Xacro files (pantilt.common.xacro, pantilt.control.xacro, pantilt.module.xacro, pantilt.urdf.xacro), the kinematic chain (base_footprint → pantilt_base_link → pan_link → tilt_link → oak_link), joint definitions, and the pt100_module embeddable macro.

pages.title: OAK-D S2 Camera Description
pages.purpose: Covers the oakd_s2.urdf.xacro macro: how the camera is attached to tilt_link, the oak_link and oak_imu_frame coordinate frames, mesh path handling (simulation vs. hardware), and the IMU offset parameters.

pages.title: 3D Mesh Assets
pages.purpose: Documents the six STL mesh files (pantilt_base, pan_motor, pan_joint, tilt_motor, tilt_joint, oakd_s2), their roles in visual and collision geometry, and the visual-offset conventions used to align meshes with joint frames.

pages.title: Motion Control (pt100_control)
pages.purpose: Overview of the pt100_control package: how ros2_control is configured for the STS3215 servos, the controller stack, and teleoperation. Links to child pages for the control stack and teleop subsystem.

pages.title: ros2_control Stack and Hardware Interface
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the controller_manager setup, ForwardCommandController (pantilt_controller), JointStateBroadcaster, the sts_hardware_interface/STSHardwareInterface plugin, startup sequencing (TimerAction delays), and the pantilt_control_config.yaml parameters including joint limits and update rate.

pages.title: Joystick Teleoperation
pages.purpose: Explains the teleop.launch.py entrypoint, the joy_teleop node, teleop_config.yaml axis mappings (left stick → pan/tilt), the deadman switch (L1/button 9), emergency stop service bindings, and the Float64MultiArray command topic.

pages.title: System Bringup (pt100_bringup)
pages.purpose: Overview of the pt100_bringup package as the top-level orchestration layer, its launch arguments, and how it composes the control and camera subsystems. Links to child pages for the main bringup launch and the camera pipeline.

pages.title: Main Bringup Launch (pt100.launch.py)
pages.purpose: Detailed walkthrough of pt100.launch.py: the three launch arguments (use_mock, diagnostics, pointcloud), how it includes pantilt.launch.py and oakd.launch.py, argument forwarding via LaunchConfiguration, and the hardware-vs-mock execution path.

pages.title: OAK-D Camera Launch and Configuration
pages.purpose: Covers oakd.launch.py (ComposableNodeContainer, depthai_ros_driver::Driver, TF parent frame wiring to tilt_link), and the two YAML configurations: vio.yaml (VIO-only) and vio_pcl.yaml (VIO + point cloud), including sensor frequencies, IMU sync, bandwidth optimizations, and image transport plugins.

pages.title: ROS 2 Interfaces Reference
pages.purpose: Comprehensive reference for all ROS 2 topics, services, and TF frames published and consumed by the system, including message types, directions, and which node owns each interface.

pages.title: Control Topics and Services
pages.purpose: Documents /pantilt_controller/commands (Float64MultiArray), /joint_states (JointState), /dynamic_joint_states (DynamicJointState), /joy (Joy), and the /emergency_stop service — with message schemas, publishers, subscribers, and QoS notes.

pages.title: Camera and VIO Topics
pages.purpose: Documents the OAK-D output topics: /oak/vio/transform (TransformStamped), /oak/rgb/image_raw and compressed variants, /oak/stereo/image_raw and compressedDepth, and the IMU data stream — with frame IDs, frequencies, and transport plugin details.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, abbreviations, hardware model names, ROS concepts, and configuration keys that an onboarding engineer needs to understand the pantilt100 ROS 2 stack. Each entry includes file/parameter pointers.
